1. 抵達美國時，具香港永久居留身分並為中國公民、且法案生效後一段時間置身美國境內的人士（也就是廣義的香港人），將被視為符合申請「臨時保護身分」；取得該身分，將獲得合法居留與工作許可；滿了若干要求，再可申請入籍。

2. 法案對曾在香港抗爭擔當「重要角色」的人士，會加速難民與庇護申請，定義包括組織管理人員、急救人員、媒體記者、協助遭捕抗議者的法律人員，和因參與抗爭行動而於2019年6月9日至2020年6月30日期間被逮捕、起訴或定罪的港人。計劃涵蓋上述人士的配偶、子女、不具其他國籍的父母。

3. 這是特殊配額，在美國每年的整體難民接收限額之外。也就是香港人移民、申請難民，依然和中國內地屬於兩條隊，這和特朗普早前說的把香港與內地徹底看齊有所分別。

4. 美國鼓勵理念相同的國家，對香港人給予同樣待遇。

這條法案假如獲得通過，幾乎是完全按照西貢淪陷後，對待南越難民的前科。
其實去美國真係驚驚地，去到加拿大英國都未必會去美國
有靚仔去美國好，有一流教育環境同機會

有錢就係，美國讀書唔平， 中小學都一樣，醫療又貴，最麻煩都係治安問題
老貓課咗金比mytbb 未？ 家陣月費幾多？

I'm a piccoloist. In the past few years, I've had several concerts which have been highly critically acclaimed by the press as well as my colleagues and teachers in the music profession. My last several concerts had attendances of more than one thousand people. I made myself front-pafe news. I was publicly acclaimed for my color (timbre, tone quality or tone color), virtuoso technique, vast repertoire and the depth of my interpretation as well as my contribution to the cultural exchange through music between Hong Kong and Japan. I was widely acclaimed by the music and art critics as Asia's greatest piccoloist of our times. On New Year's Eve, I returned to Japan to perform in my New Year recital which was widely critically acclaimed by the critics as well as my colleagues and teachers within the music profession. I was publicly acclaimed on the front page of many newspapers and magazines as one of the greatest piccoloist of our times, such as Hong Kong Economic Times, Hong Kong Economic Journal, Southern Daily, South China Morning Post, Japan Today, Japan Times Online, China News Service and China National Radio. I got great attendance despite the bad weather and the coronavirus outbreak. My friend Isaac performed in a festival last Tuesday. However, attendance at the festival was unusually thin. There was an attendance of about fifty people at the festival. Nonetheless, it was front-page news. Do you play any sports? I'm a gym lover. I go to the gym three to four times a week. I would say I'm lean and strong. I don't wanna be too big like a bodybuilder because if I were, I'd be so clumsy and my hands and fingers wouldn't be nimble enough to play the piano. I also enjoy hiking, playing basketball and badminton. Do you have any pets? I had a Siberian husky who grew up with me. He died at the age of fourteen in twenty fifteen. I now have a lop bunny and three turtles; they're one Mexican musk turtle and two red-eared sliders. My bunny is a rex and lop mix bunny. Rabbits are pretty animals which means they're everybody else's lunch in nature. A dog barking, a fire engine siren wailing, an ambulance siren wailing, a child shouting, an airplane roaring overhead and lightning storm can frighten rabbits. Therefore, walking a rabbit on a leash isn't recommended. Indoor rabbits have a much longer lifespan than outdoor rabbits because they're protected from poor weather conditions and enemies. They feel safe, protected, monitored, sheltered and that they're part of the family! The average lifespan of an indoor house rabbit is eight to fourteen years whereas that of a rabbit kept in an outdoor hutch or cage is three to six years. The happiest rabbit expression is called binky. When a bunny binkies, it jumps into the air and twists its head and body in the opposite direction before falling back to the ground. A happy bunny even twirls, flops, shakes its head and stretches its legs. All these are telling you that it's happy and overall pleased with you and its life. Rabbits produce two types of droppings: fecal pellets and cecal pellets (aka cecotropes). The former are the dry, round ones you usually see in the litterbox whereas the latter are edible for rabbits which contain essential nutrients. Rabbits are one of the most abandoned pets in the world. In fact, rabbits are the third most abandoned pets in the United States because people don't understand rabbits and think that they're boring and that they don't bond with humans. Rabbits are highly intelligent, social and affectionate animals. While they don't like to be picked up from the ground, they'd much rather be petted and cuddled while they're on the ground or in your lap. When people say they wanna have a pet rabbit, I usually advise them to visit the rabbit society and choose a rabbit for adoption.

上述升級都是強制執行的，除非修改Windows註冊表或組策略。

rise

丘鈦科技 公布，今年11月攝像頭模組銷售數量合計為3,495.3萬件，按月下跌6.3%，按年下跌16.8%。其中，800萬像素及以下攝像頭模組為1,192.4萬件，按年下跌26%。而1,000萬像素及以上攝像頭模組為2,302.9萬件，按年減少11.1%，當中3,200萬像素及以上攝像頭模組為934.6萬件，按年增62.5%。

另外，11月指紋識別模組銷售數量合計為1,045.2萬件，按月增長23.8%，按年下跌13.4%。其中，屏下指紋識別模組為562萬件，按年增長6.1%；非屏下指紋識別模組為483.2萬件，按年減28.6%。
